name: Deploy to Pterodactyl

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      
      - name: Pterodactyl File Upload
        uses: matisiekpl/pterodactyl-deploy-action@v1.4.0
        with:
          panel-url: ${{ secrets.PTERODACTYL_URL }}
          api-key: ${{ secrets.PTERODACTYL_API_KEY }}
          server-id: ${{ secrets.PTERODACTYL_SERVER_ID }}

      
      - name: Restart Pterodactyl Server
        run: |
          curl -X POST "${{ secrets.PTERODACTYL_URL }}/api/client/servers/${{ secrets.PTERODACTYL_ID }}/power" \
          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.PTERODACTYL_API_KEY }}" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -H "Accept: application/json" \
          -d '{"signal": "restart"}'
